citation: 12 CFR §1026.22(a)(3) - irregular transaction within +/- 1/4 pp tolerance
comment: Hand-calc: |0.0700 - 0.0720| = 0.002 fractional. TOLERANCE_IRREGULAR = 0.0025. 0.002 <= 0.0025 -> within_apr_tolerance=True. Pins the irregular-transaction-gets-more-lenient-tolerance branch (this same diff would FAIL for regular: 0.002 > 0.00125).
